 def make_env(rank):

     def _init():

         env_id = env_ids[rank % len(env_ids)]

         env = gym.make(env_id)

-        env = ImgObsWrapper(env)

+        env = FlatObsWrapper(env)

         env.reset(seed=rank)

         return env

     return _init

 

 if __name__ == '__main__':
